introSection: Nio (Japanese: ニオー) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan. Opened in 1997, it is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma.
fullText:
Nio (Japanese: ニオー) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan. Opened in 1997, it is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma.



Red track and supports.




 * Nio on the parks website (Japanese)
